en: A SONG OF ASCENTS.To you I lift up my eyes, O you who are enthroned in the heavens!
zh: 坐在天上的主啊！ 我向你舉目。

en: Behold, as the eyes of servants look to the hand of their master, as the eyes of a maidservant to the hand of her mistress, so our eyes look to the LORD our God, till he has mercy upon us.
zh: 僕人的眼睛怎樣望著主人的手， 婢女的眼睛怎樣望著主母的手， 我們的眼睛也照樣望著耶和華我們的 神， 直到他向我們施恩。

en: Have mercy upon us, O LORD, have mercy upon us, for we have had more than enough of contempt.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你向我們施恩，求你向我們施恩； 因為我們飽受藐視，到了極點。

en: Our soul has had more than enough of the scorn of those who are at ease, of the contempt of the proud.
zh: 我們飽受那些安逸的人的嘲笑， 和驕傲的人的藐視，到了極點。
